overall.description: Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person walk along a futuristic waterfront promenade during the blue hour. The camera moves from beneath a highway overpass past palm-lined walkways and neon-lit mega-structures, with views of an amusement park across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront walkway beneath highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward beneath the concrete highway overpass

entered.detail: concrete bridge structure overhead casting shadows on the walkway
black metal railing separating the walkway from the water
calm bay water with distant foggy skyline visible
road running parallel to the walkway with occasional vehicles
tall cyberpunk structure with green and orange facade visible to the right

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass that blocks most of the sky, creating a sheltered, dimly lit environment. The camera moves forward along a concrete waterfront walkway, with metal railings on the left overlooking the water and a road on the right. A futuristic mega-building is visible in the distance to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with amusement park views

events.description: exits the covered overpass into the open waterfront area with full sky visibility
roller coaster structure becomes visible across the water on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade as the environment opens up to reveal expansive waterfront views

entered.detail: amusement park roller coaster with red tracks visible across the bay
hazy silhouettes of tall buildings on the horizon across the water

segments.scene_description: Emerging from beneath the overpass, the scene opens into a wide waterfront promenade with full sky visibility and natural sunset lighting. The camera continues forward as a roller coaster structure becomes visible across the water on the left, while distant skyscrapers appear hazily on the horizon.

events.description: slight turn to the right while maintaining forward momentum along the curve of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the curved promenade lined with palm trees, approaching a distant pedestrian

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera along the center of the promenade path

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the walkway along the water
palm trees and greenery on the right side between the walkway and road
tall contemporary street lamp with horizontal light fixture

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along an open, palm-lined waterfront promenade during the blue hour. The futuristic mega-building on the right grows larger and closer, while palm trees line both sides of the path. A solitary pedestrian is visible walking toward the camera in the distance, and modern street lamps illuminate the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic mega-building facade with neon signage

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the futuristic building with neon advertisements
camera tilts back down to resume forward-facing walking perspective

agents.ego_description: pausing forward movement to look up at the towering cyberpunk architecture with glowing neon signage

entered.detail: illuminated billboards with Asian characters and corporate logos on the building facade
layered futuristic building design with multiple balconies and structural elements

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to examine the imposing futuristic mega-building, revealing its stacked architectural design and bright neon advertisement signs against the evening sky. After a moment of observation, the camera tilts back down to resume the forward walking perspective.

events.description: futuristic vehicle with headlights on passes by on the right side road

agents.ego_description: resuming forward movement along the promenade, approaching a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera on the promenade path wearing casual clothing

entered.detail: bay water visible again as camera returns to forward facing
palm trees along the waterfront railing

segments.scene_description: Returning to the forward-facing perspective, the camera continues along the waterfront promenade with the body of water and palm trees visible on the left. The futuristic mega-building recedes into the background on the right as the camera approaches a pedestrian walking toward it, while a vehicle passes on the adjacent road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered concrete underpass into a wide, neon-lit futuristic promenade during the blue hour. It begins beneath a massive highway overpass in a dimly lit environment, moving forward along a waterfront walkway with a distant mega-building visible to the right. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the scene opens into a broad promenade under a sunset sky, revealing a roller coaster structure across the water and hazy skyscrapers on the horizon. The path then expands into a palm-lined walkway illuminated by modern street lamps, where the camera briefly tilts upward to examine the stacked architecture and glowing neon signs of the imposing mega-building before returning to a forward gaze. Finally, the camera continues past a passing vehicle and toward an oncoming pedestrian, with the water and palm trees remaining on the left as the massive structure recedes into the background.
